---
pagetitle: "Blog — Glenn Moncrieff"
listing:
  id: posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: custom
  template: theme/listing.ejs
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  date-format: "YYYY · MM · DD"
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
---

<header class="page-head wrap">
  <span class="mono">// Notes &amp; write-ups</span>
  <h1>Blog</h1>
  <p>Tutorials, project write-ups, and notes on biodiversity, remote sensing, machine learning, and monitoring vegetation. Also my own thoughts on conservation issues and personal notes from big adventures.</p>
</header>

<section class="section--tight wrap">

::: {#posts}
:::

</section>
